UserResult.title: User Result
UserResult.description: A quiz result for a specific user.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The profile picture URL of the user.

category.description: The winning category of the quiz.

totalPoints.description: Total points earned in the quiz.

scores.description: The detailed scores for each category.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A message in the global chat.

/results/{resultId}.description: Global collection of quiz results for the leaderboard.
